findings.problem: The chapter sanitizes Gabriel's sharpest reaction beat. When Marisol reports that Paloma is being held and her visa is under review, the draft retreats into narrated swearing ("He swore under his breath") and a cleaned-up reply instead of rendering the anger directly on the page, which softens both the political retaliation and Gabriel's pressure response.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:223, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:227, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229 so Gabriel's reaction is rendered in exact on-page language and bodily residue rather than summarized as swearing. Keep the beat specific to Paloma's detention and rough enough to satisfy the constitution's anti-sanitization rule.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passage at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:223 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229 contains Gabriel's exact raw utterance, or equivalently concrete free-indirect phrasing, plus a sensory or social trace of the outburst; fail if the moment can still be paraphrased as narrated swearing followed by a neutral line.

findings.problem: Ivo and Gabriel are both written cleaner than their style-bible pressure registers. Ivo's crushed-foot and wage-loss lines stay almost entirely tidy and non-profane despite a high-profanity profile, while Gabriel's immigration and witness-risk language also stays polished. The result is partial idiolect flattening: two distinct men under extreme stress land in a similarly controlled literary register.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework Ivo's pressure beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:49 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:91, plus Gabriel's beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:229, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:311. Let Ivo roughen through mechanic deadpan and character-specific profanity, and let Gabriel sharpen into his own harsher documentary anger rather than the same polished clarity.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, by reading the revised lines at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:49, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:257, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:311, a reader can distinguish Ivo from Gabriel by rhythm and roughness alone, and each man has at least one high-pressure line with character-appropriate coarse language; fail if both still sound equally controlled and profanity-free.

findings.problem: The bakery scene starts to loop on mutual-acknowledgment replies. Repeated variants of "I know" and "I didn't say you didn't" begin answering the wound without changing leverage, which blunts the witness-choice scene just as it should keep deepening.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the exchange centered on snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:241, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:243, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:265, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:269, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:301, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:303. Keep one acknowledgment loop if needed, then replace the later repetitions with new admissions, refusals, silences, or concrete memories that materially alter what the other person understands.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, after Gabriel raises leaving tonight at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247, the revised exchange through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:303 uses no more than one bare acknowledgment reply and every later turn either adds a new concrete fact, names a new cost, or changes what the other person concedes; fail if the scene still cycles through repeated "I know" variants.

findings.problem: The chapter repeats the same interpretive sentence shape at major emotional hinges: negating one reading and then restating the "real" one. By the third iteration, the prose starts sounding pre-authored rather than discovered, and it explains feelings the surrounding scene already carries.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast at least two of the hinges at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:189, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313 so they land through image, gesture, or a different sentence shape. Leave at most one explicit negation-and-redefinition beat if you want it as a deliberate emphasis.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no more than one of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:189, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:295, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:313 still uses an explicit negation/redefinition formula to explain the emotional turn; fail if all three beats keep the same explanatory construction.

summary: Chapter 17 satisfies the aftermath spine, keeps continuity intact, and sustains past-tense close-third control, but it does not clear review because a key Gabriel reaction is sanitized, the bakery exchange overuses acknowledgment loops, and the back half repeats an interpretive prose formula at multiple emotional hinges.
